title: Support property variable declaration and others

features.name: property local variable declaration with realtime type
features.description: Code should include a property declaration with a local variable of realtime type declared within the property body

features.name: property with disable iff condition
features.description: Code should include a property declaration that uses disable iff for reset disable condition

features.name: sequence expression with local variable assignment via comma operator
features.description: Code should include a sequence expression that uses the comma operator to assign a local variable alongside a condition

features.name: property with real type formal argument
features.description: Code should include a property declaration with a formal argument of real type
